name: Patrick J. McGovern Foundation
focus: AI for social good, health, human rights, data as public good
notes: Gave $200K to AI+mental health at UCSF in 2025. Strong fit for Connectome's AI + human flourishing angle.

name: Survival and Flourishing Fund (SFF)
focus: Long-term human flourishing, AI safety, human self-enhancement
notes: 2026 cycle includes 'Human Self-Enhancement and Empowerment' theme — direct match.

name: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation
focus: AI to accelerate charitable giving, global health & development
notes: Grand Challenges RFP open. Deadline was Apr 28 2026 — may need next cycle. Email gcgh@gatesfoundation.org to register interest for next round.

name: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative (CZI)
focus: Science, education, human potential, AI for good
notes: CZI funds human potential and AI intersections. Strong fit for research angle.

name: Wellcome Trust
focus: AI + mental health, anxiety, depression, psychosis research
notes: Generative AI for mental health program. Need research institution partner. Worth contacting to explore.

name: Google.org Generative AI Accelerator
focus: Generative AI for social good, children's mental health, crisis response
grant_range: Share of $30,000,000 + pro bono Google engineers
notes: 6-month accelerator program with $30M pool + Google Cloud credits. 2025 cohort focused on mental health. 2026 cohort TBD.

name: Omidyar Network
focus: Human dignity, technology for good, individual empowerment
notes: Part of the $500M Humanity AI initiative. Focus on preserving human dignity in the AI era.

name: Eric and Wendy Schmidt Fund
focus: AI safety, human flourishing, long-term positive futures
notes: Schmidt Futures funds at intersection of AI and long-term human benefit.

name: Rockefeller Foundation
focus: Human flourishing, health equity, technology for good
notes: Longstanding interest in human potential and health equity. AI focus growing.

name: MacArthur Foundation
focus: Human potential, mental health, technology and society
notes: MacArthur funds bold ideas with transformative potential. Fit is strong on vision.
